# Gymshark

Gymshark is a UK-based sportswear and athleisure retailer, co-founded by CEO Ben Francis in 2012. After growing online, it opened its first store on Regent Street in London in 2022. Gymshark was one of the first brands to successfully implement influencer marketing strategies and it has a popular online community. Retail Week provides news, analysis, features and opinion about Gymshark and the sports retail sector.
